/usr/bin/ar qc libimgui_vk.a "CMakeFiles/imgui_vk.dir/__/_deps/imgui-src/imgui.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/imgui_vk.dir/__/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_draw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/imgui_vk.dir/__/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_tables.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/imgui_vk.dir/__/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_widgets.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/imgui_vk.dir/__/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/imgui_vk.dir/__/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libimgui_vk.a
